name: agent-passport-system
description: Governance infrastructure for AI agents. Ed25519 identity, scoped delegation, enforcement gateway under 2ms, 5-gate commerce, Merkle attribution, bilateral receipts (in-toto Decision Receipt v0.1). 124 modules, 2,410 tests, 150 MCP tools. SDK 2.3.0-alpha on npm under alpha tag.
author: aeoess
